title: symphyotrichum praealtum var. subasperum
intro: Symphyotrichum praealtum var. subasperum, also known as New England aster, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Symphyotrichum praealtum var. subasperum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
